statement.p: At a recent trip to the casino, Esteban brought {\$960} in cash. He knows he needs to hold on to {\$90} in reserve to pay for dinner later. Unfortunately Esteban had rough luck and was losing money at the slot machines at an average rate of {\$225} per hour. How long was Esteban gambling before he had to stop? Write an equation to model this scenario. There is no need to solve it.
